title: coelogyne dewildeorum
intro: Coelogyne dewildeorum, also known as the Dewilde's Coelogyne, is a species of orchid found in the tropical forests of Sumatra, Indonesia. This terrestrial orchid is native to the island and is known for its unique, small, yellow-green flowers. The Coelogyne dewildeorum is not commonly used in traditional medicine, but its rhizomes have been reported to have antimicrobial properties, which may be beneficial in treating infections. While no specific herbal preparations are widely recognized for this plant, the potential benefits of its antimicrobial properties suggest it could be used to support immune function and overall health.
